Off Calendar Dec-13-2010 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 10:23 am
Judge Pro Tem Nancy Newman, clerk - Leslie Gomez, nothing on record, dept. 414.
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Appellant, SF General Hospital, appears through attorney Mark Lipton, CCSF. Respondent William Whitmore apppears in pro per with Tom Wen. Parties, previously sworn, testify in the narrative and respond to questions from Judge Newman.

EXHR (A) Medical records

Appellant calls Dr. Hashimoto as an expert and precipiant witness.
Appellant calls Dr. Carroll as an expert witness.
Respondent calls Tom Wen as a witness.

11:36am
Evidence is retained, matter is submitted
